open_positions.name: Extreme Networks
open_positions.thesis: Sympathy selling off CALX print - both are networking/access equipment names. EXTR down 5.8% on 3x volume with no company-specific news in feed, while XLK is up 2.2%, strongly suggests read-through trade. Catalyst: CALX -14% print dragging networking peers. Falsified by: Discovery of EXTR-specific negative catalyst (pre-announce, lost deal, downgrade) would validate the move; continued sector-wide weakness would suggest broader enterprise IT spend concern.
open_positions.latest_reasoning: Entered same-day (0 days held) on CALX sympathy thesis with 3-day horizon flagged. No new company-specific catalyst has emerged to break the thesis; XLK remains +2.2%, which still supports a sector-wide read and argues against broad enterprise IT concern. The -5.8% move on 3x volume is consistent with panic spillover into a lower-liquidity peer. However, position is -9.75% and must prove itself within the flagged horizon. HOLD to test whether sympathy bounce occurs as sector stabilizes or whether EXTR-specific news emerges. If EXTR dips another 3–5% without CALX deteriorating further, or if negative EXTR guidance surfaces, EXIT becomes mandatory. Confidence in this hold decision is LOW (2) given my 0% track record on this exact classification/confidence combo, but exiting same-day on a thesis that hasn't been falsified yet would lock in a loss and signal poor discipline.

trade_log.why: Opened per flag: LIKELY OVERDONE conf 3 — CALX -14% print dragging networking peers
